title: AI Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Build retrieval augmented generation features, connect FastAPI services to Qdrant, and evaluate prompt outputs for internal product assistants.
requirements: Python experience, basic LangChain or LangGraph knowledge, REST API familiarity, and comfort working with vector search.
raw_text: AI Engineer Intern - ABC AI Lab, Ha Noi hybrid. Work on RAG features with LangChain, FastAPI, and Qdrant. Requirements include Python, REST APIs, vector search, and prompt evaluation.

title: LLM Application Intern
responsibilities: Prototype OpenAI API workflows, add evaluation scripts, and integrate vector database retrieval into customer support tools.
requirements: Python, OpenAI API basics, prompt engineering, Git, and SQL fundamentals.
raw_text: LLM Application Intern at Northstar Automation. Remote paid internship building OpenAI API workflows, prompt evaluations, and vector DB retrieval for support automation. Python and SQL required.

title: GenAI Backend Intern
responsibilities: Create FastAPI endpoints for AI workflows, maintain SQLite-backed job queues, and write tests around embedding and ranking services.
requirements: Python, FastAPI, SQLite, pytest, and interest in embeddings or ranking systems.
raw_text: GenAI Backend Intern - River Cloud, Da Nang hybrid. Build FastAPI endpoints for AI workflows, maintain SQLite persistence, and test embedding and ranking services. Python and pytest needed.

title: RAG Evaluation Intern
responsibilities: Design evaluation datasets, inspect retrieval quality, and tune prompts for knowledge base question answering.
requirements: Python scripting, basic information retrieval concepts, data analysis, and clear technical writing.
raw_text: RAG Evaluation Intern at Atlas Knowledge Systems in Ha Noi. Design evaluation datasets, inspect retrieval quality, and tune prompts for QA over company knowledge bases. Python and retrieval basics required.

title: AI Workflow Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Connect backend services to LLM providers, normalize job data, and monitor token cost and latency for prototype workflows.
requirements: Python, API integration experience, JSON data modeling, and willingness to learn LangGraph-style state pipelines.
raw_text: AI Workflow Engineer Intern - Mekong Data Works. Hybrid in Ho Chi Minh City. Connect backend services to LLM providers, normalize job data, and track token cost and latency. Python and API integration required.

title: Backend Intern
responsibilities: Maintain FastAPI endpoints, improve SQLite queries, and add small automation scripts for internal operations.
requirements: Python, FastAPI, SQL basics, and interest in AI product tooling.
raw_text: Backend Intern - Blue Lantern Software, Ha Noi. Maintain FastAPI endpoints, improve SQLite queries, and add automation scripts. AI product tooling is a plus but not the main role.

title: Data Engineering Intern
responsibilities: Build ETL scripts, validate incoming datasets, and prepare feature tables for analytics dashboards.
requirements: Python, SQL, basic data modeling, and familiarity with cloud storage.
raw_text: Data Engineering Intern at Signal Metrics. Remote internship building ETL scripts, validating datasets, and preparing feature tables. Python and SQL required; no direct LLM work mentioned.

title: QA Automation Intern
responsibilities: Write pytest suites, automate regression checks, and review logs from backend services.
requirements: Python basics, test design, Git, and ability to document defects clearly.
raw_text: QA Automation Intern - BrightOps, Ho Chi Minh City onsite. Write pytest suites, automate regression checks, and review backend logs. Python basics and Git required.

title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Prepare weekly sales dashboards, clean spreadsheet exports, and summarize campaign performance for store managers.
requirements: Excel, SQL basics, dashboard experience, and careful communication.
raw_text: Data Analyst Intern at Retail Pulse in Ha Noi. Prepare sales dashboards, clean spreadsheet exports, and summarize campaign performance. Excel and SQL basics required.

title: Graphic Design Intern
responsibilities: Create social media visuals, resize campaign assets, and maintain brand templates for marketing launches.
requirements: Figma or Adobe tools, portfolio samples, typography basics, and attention to visual detail.
raw_text: Graphic Design Intern - Lotus Creative Studio, Da Nang. Create social media visuals, resize campaign assets, and maintain brand templates. Figma or Adobe tools required.
